description_long: This is a rectangular office desk with a light gray, flat tabletop and a sturdy wooden base. The right side features a set of three vertically stacked drawers with metallic handles, providing storage space for office supplies or documents. The left side is supported by a solid wooden panel, while the right side's drawers extend to the floor, giving the desk a balanced and functional appearance. The wood grain texture is visible on the supporting panels and drawers, contrasting with the smooth, light-colored surface of the tabletop. The desk is designed for practical use, offering ample legroom beneath the tabletop and easy access to the drawers. Its clean lines and neutral colors make it suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A rectangular desk with a light gray top, wooden sides, and three right-side drawers with metallic handles. The design is modern and functional, suitable for office or study use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop, three right-side drawers with handles, and the left support panel.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth of the desk and the solid wooden panel on the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing both supporting panels and the back of the drawers, with no handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right support and the back of the drawers, with the tabletop extending above.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the three drawers and handles on the right, and the open leg space on the left, indicating the front of the desk.
